field.label: Instance
field.help: The Nebula instance this static host map entry belongs to.

field.label: Lighthouse certificate
field.help: Optionally pick the peer's host certificate to auto-fill its Nebula IP below from the certificate's networks. A convenience only — the Nebula IP is what is stored.

field.label: Nebula IP
field.help: The peer's Nebula overlay IP (a single host address, e.g. 192.168.100.1) — the key of this static host map entry.

field.label: Underlay addresses
field.help: One or more underlay host:port addresses to reach the peer before discovery. Type each address and press Enter to add it as a tag, e.g. 198.51.100.1:4242 then 203.0.113.5:4242.

field.label: Description
field.help: Optional human-readable label for this entry.
